flowTitle: XIIGen Community Platform - User Groups & Communities

freedomConfigAdaptation.description: Tenant-safe values that can change at fork time without changing MACHINE ordering, access control, or scope isolation.

keys.semantic: Controls how GroupFeedPopulator balances recency and popularity when scoring feed items for an active group member.

boundedRange.rationale: Weights are normalized scoring inputs; MACHINE logic still clamps final engagement score to [0, 1].

grammarAdaptation.description: FLOW-06 has no tenant-editable grammar surface.

roleScopeAdaptation.description: Role visibility is implemented through existing role-aware pages and global authorization checks.

businessDomainAdaptation.description: Tenant-specific community policies that may become future FREEDOM keys after this first proof.

edgeCases.name: Invite-only join handling
edgeCases.semantic: Private groups can require valid invitations before a membership request is accepted.
edgeCases.currentImplementation: MACHINE guard: invite-only checks happen before accepted membership is stored.

edgeCases.name: Tier-gated content
edgeCases.semantic: Content delivery depends on active membership and tier access.
edgeCases.currentImplementation: MACHINE guard: access is logged and denied unless membership and tier checks pass.

ironRulesMACHINE.description: Fixed invariants that tenants cannot change without breaking portability or authorization certification.
rules: CF-06-1: Content retrieval begins only after active membership is stored.
CF-06-2: Membership tier comes from server-side subscription or membership state, not client input.
CF-06-3: Membership creation is idempotent for the same user and group.
CF-06-4: Membership, approval, feed, and tier records remain PRIVATE per tenant.
DNA-8: storeDocument completes before enqueue for membership, tier, feed, and access events.

freedom-config-example-feed-weighting.description: Tenant A favors fresh community posts over popular older posts.
freedom-config-example-feed-weighting.impact: Feed ordering becomes more time-sensitive while access control, membership activation, and score clamping stay unchanged.
freedom-config-example-feed-weighting.testable: GroupFeedPopulator reads the flow-scoped FREEDOM key and still clamps engagement scores.

notPartOfAdaptationSurface.description: MACHINE elements that must not change during tenant adaptation.
elements: Task type IDs T71, T72, T89, and T90
